iReduceBattleAi.name: Reduce Battle Ai
iReduceBattleAi.description: Affects agent's ai. 0 - good, 1 - average, 2 - poor.  Operations: options_get_combat_ai, options_set_combat_ai.

iMinNumAgentsForNavMeshReuse.name: Min Num Agents For Nav Mesh Reuse
iMinNumAgentsForNavMeshReuse.description: Used for ai agent compute path.

bUseAdvancedFormation.name: Use Advanced Formation
bUseAdvancedFormation.description:
Determines if the module uses Native’s advanced formations. Those add extensions to the order menus related to formations and weapon usage.
Players can then let the troops line up from one row to five rows and order their archers to fire at their command. Some lines need to be added to ui.csv for this.

bAiDecideDirectionAccordingToDamage.name: Ai Decide Direction According To Damage
bAiDecideDirectionAccordingToDamage.description: AI will take into consideration what each directional attack’s damage will be when deciding what attack to use.

bConsiderWeaponLengthForWeaponQuality.name: Consider Weapon Length For Weapon Quality
bConsiderWeaponLengthForWeaponQuality.description: Makes agents take into account a weapon’s length when choosing a weapon at their inventory.

iFxaa.name: Fxaa
iFxaa.description: Antialiasing (FXAA). Smooths out jagged edges, significantly blurs the screen. 0 - none, 1 - low, 2 - medium, 3 - high.

iPostProcess.name: Post Process
iPostProcess.description: Post Processing Filter. 0 - none, 1 - Light Sharpen, 2 - Strong Sharpen, 3 - MAKE MY EYES BLEED

iHighDynamicRange.name: High Dynamic Range
iHighDynamicRange.description: High dynamic range (HDR) is a technique that produces images with a greater dynamic range of luminosity than standard dynamic range (SDR) images, allowing for realistic depictions of color and brightness. 0 - off, 1 - low, 2 - high

bDepthEffects.name: Depth Effects
bDepthEffects.description: Depth of Field is a post-processing effect that simulates the focus properties of a camera lens.

bAutoExposure.name: Auto Exposure
bAutoExposure.description: Auto Exposure mimics how the human eye adjusts in varying levels of darkness.

iGrassMinFilter.name: Grass Min Filter
iGrassMinFilter.description: 0 - filtering disabled, 1 - nearest, 2 - linear interpolation, 3 - anisotropic

iGrassMagFilter.name: Grass Mag Filter
iGrassMagFilter.description: 0 - filtering disabled, 1 - nearest, 2 - linear interpolation, 3 - anisotropic

fFloraDegradeDistance.name: Flora Degrade Distance
fFloraDegradeDistance.description: Configures the Flora Degrade Distance setting.

bFirstRun.name: First Run
bFirstRun.description: When you first start the game sets certain settings depending on the configuration of the PC.

sCoreResources.name: Core Resources
sCoreResources.description: Core resources list, loaded first when launching any mod.

sIntroVideos.name: Intro Videos
sIntroVideos.description: You can override list of videos for your module by specifying a relative path to module folder for them.

iMaxFrameRate.name: Max Frame Rate
iMaxFrameRate.description: Configures the Max Frame Rate setting.

bShowFrameRate.name: Show Frame Rate
bShowFrameRate.description: Configures the Show Frame Rate setting.

bPauseWhenMinimized.name: Pause When Minimized
bPauseWhenMinimized.description: Pause game when window minimized, does not recommend for multiplayer, because disconnect from server due to timeout.

bSuppressPerformanceWarnings.name: Suppress Performance Warnings
bSuppressPerformanceWarnings.description: Configures the Suppress Performance Warnings setting.

bSuppressScriptErrors.name: Suppress Script Errors
bSuppressScriptErrors.description: Configures the Suppress Script Errors setting.

bHasTutorial.name: Has Tutorial
bHasTutorial.description: Determines if Tutorial appears on the main menu.

bHasSingleplayer.name: Has Singleplayer
bHasSingleplayer.description: Determines if New Game and Load Game appear on main menu.

bHasMultiplayer.name: Has Multiplayer
bHasMultiplayer.description: Determines if Multiplayer appears on the main menu.

bHasCustomBattle.name: Has Custom Battle
bHasCustomBattle.description: Determines if Custom Battle appears on the main menu.

iNumHints.name: Num Hints
iNumHints.description: Total number of hints visible on the secondary loading screen.

bHasOneHanded.name: Has One Handed
bHasOneHanded.description: Determines the visibility of the weapon proficiency inside the character menu, but the weapons and the ability to use them still exists in the game.

bEnableLogWindowBackground.name: Enable Log Window Background
bEnableLogWindowBackground.description: Background mesh for multiplayer log window.

sModuleDownloadUrl.name: Module Download Url
sModuleDownloadUrl.description: When you try to connect to a server for which there is no module in the game, it offers to download it from this link.

bUseCaseInsensitiveMeshSearches.name: Use Case Insensitive Mesh Searches
bUseCaseInsensitiveMeshSearches.description: Determines if your module allows case insensitive references to mesh names i.e. sword_a and Sword_a being treated as the same reference.

sStoragePath.name: Storage Path
sStoragePath.description: Path where WSE created files are stored (empty for default).

bLuaDisableGameConstWarnings.name: Lua Disable Game Const Warnings
bLuaDisableGameConstWarnings.description: Mutes warnings during msfiles folder scanning for lua.

bCheatMode.name: Cheat Mode
bCheatMode.description: In-game cheats, useful for mod development. Operations: is_cheat_mode_enabled, options_get_cheat_mode, options_set_cheat_mode.

bEditMode.name: Edit Mode
bEditMode.description: Scene editor, some debug features. Be warned, this slows down the game. Operations: is_edit_mode_enabled, edit_mode_set_enabled.

bMainMenuScene.name: Main Menu Scene
bMainMenuScene.description: Add scene to your module main menu. https://forums.taleworlds.com/index.php?threads/warband-script-enhancer-2-v1-0-6-4.384882/page-18#post-9758258

bAllowDuplicateMeshes.name: Allow Duplicate Meshes
bAllowDuplicateMeshes.description: Merges meshes with the same name.

bLocalVariablesZeroInitialization.name: Local Variables Zero Initialization
bLocalVariablesZeroInitialization.description: set to TRUE to initialize all locals variables with zeros, FALSE will give better performance

bHasMultiplayerCampaign.name: Has Multiplayer Campaign
bHasMultiplayerCampaign.description: Determines if Join a Campaign appears on the Multiplayer menu.

fFirstPersonFieldOfView.name: First Person Field Of View
fFirstPersonFieldOfView.description: Extent of the observable game world that is seen on the display at any given moment for first person. Range: 55.0-100.0

fThirdPersonFieldOfView.name: Third Person Field Of View
fThirdPersonFieldOfView.description: Extent of the observable game world that is seen on the display at any given moment for third person. Range: 55.0-100.0

fBloodMultiplier.name: Blood Multiplier
fBloodMultiplier.description: Determines the amount and velocity of blood particle effects.

iBannerMode.name: Banner Mode
iBannerMode.description: 0 - none, 1 - on group, 2 - on friendlies, 3 - on everyone

iBannerOutlineMode.name: Banner Outline Mode
iBannerOutlineMode.description: 0 - none, 1 - on group, 2 - on friendlies, 3 - on everyone

uBannerOutlineColorFriendly.name: Banner Outline Color Friendly
uBannerOutlineColorFriendly.description: Configures the Banner Outline Color Friendly setting.

uBannerOutlineColorEnemy.name: Banner Outline Color Enemy
uBannerOutlineColorEnemy.description: Configures the Banner Outline Color Enemy setting.

uBannerOutlineColorNeutral.name: Banner Outline Color Neutral
uBannerOutlineColorNeutral.description: Configures the Banner Outline Color Neutral setting.

fDynamicBannerTransparencyMinDistance.name: Dynamic Banner Transparency Min Distance
fDynamicBannerTransparencyMinDistance.description: Configures the Dynamic Banner Transparency Min Distance setting.

fDynamicBannerTransparencyMaxDistance.name: Dynamic Banner Transparency Max Distance
fDynamicBannerTransparencyMaxDistance.description: Configures the Dynamic Banner Transparency Max Distance setting.

iDynamicBannerTransparencyMaxAlpha.name: Dynamic Banner Transparency Max Alpha
iDynamicBannerTransparencyMaxAlpha.description: Configures the Dynamic Banner Transparency Max Alpha setting.

iFixedBannerTransparencyAlpha.name: Fixed Banner Transparency Alpha
iFixedBannerTransparencyAlpha.description: Configures the Fixed Banner Transparency Alpha setting.

iFixedBannerTransparencyOutlineAlpha.name: Fixed Banner Transparency Outline Alpha
iFixedBannerTransparencyOutlineAlpha.description: Configures the Fixed Banner Transparency Outline Alpha setting.

bDynamicBannerTransparency.name: Dynamic Banner Transparency
bDynamicBannerTransparency.description: Use dynamic banner transparency depending on distance or fixed.

bShowAttackDirection.name: Show Attack Direction
bShowAttackDirection.description: Configures the Show Attack Direction setting.

iAttackControl.name: Attack Control
iAttackControl.description: 0 - by relative enemy position, 1 - by inverse mouse movement, 2 - by mouse movement, 3 - by movement keys

iMountedAttackControl.name: Mounted Attack Control
iMountedAttackControl.description: 0 - by relative enemy position, 1 - by inverse mouse movement, 2 - by mouse movement, 3 - by movement keys

iDefendControl.name: Defend Control
iDefendControl.description: 0 - automatic, 1 - by mouse movement, 2 - by movement keys, 3 - by inverse mouse movement

iMountedDefendControl.name: Mounted Defend Control
iMountedDefendControl.description: 0 - automatic, 1 - by mouse movement, 2 - by movement keys, 3 - by inverse mouse movement

iHorseCameraMode.name: Horse Camera Mode
iHorseCameraMode.description: 0 - never, 1 - ranged only, 2 - melee only, 3 - always

iCombatSpeed.name: Combat Speed
iCombatSpeed.description: 0 - slowest, 1 - slower, 2 - normal, 3 - faster, 5 - fastest. Operations: options_get_combat_speed, options_set_combat_speed.

iBattleSizeMin.name: Battle Size Min
iBattleSizeMin.description: The minimum value for a visual display of the size of the battle, depending on fBattleSize.

iBattleSizeMax.name: Battle Size Max
iBattleSizeMax.description: The maximum value for a visual display of the size of the battle, depending on fBattleSize.

iNumWalkSamplePoints.name: Num Walk Sample Points
iNumWalkSamplePoints.description: Used for animation progress with arf_use_inv_walk_progress or arf_use_walk_progress flags.

fMinInflictedDamageForHighDamageHit.name: Min Inflicted Damage For High Damage Hit
fMinInflictedDamageForHighDamageHit.description: Affects hit sound for melee weapon.

iMinSoakedDamageForHighArmorHit.name: Min Soaked Damage For High Armor Hit
iMinSoakedDamageForHighArmorHit.description: Affects hit sound for melee weapon.

fHorseJumpCooldown.name: Horse Jump Cooldown
fHorseJumpCooldown.description: Configures the Horse Jump Cooldown setting.

bNoJumpingWhileAttackingMelee.name: No Jumping While Attacking Melee
bNoJumpingWhileAttackingMelee.description: Determines if an agent can jumping while melee attack.

bNoJumpingWhileAttackingThrowing.name: No Jumping While Attacking Throwing
bNoJumpingWhileAttackingThrowing.description: Determines if an agent can jumping while throwing attack.

bNoJumpingWhileAttackingRanged.name: No Jumping While Attacking Ranged
bNoJumpingWhileAttackingRanged.description: Determines if an agent can jumping while ranged attack.

bNoAttackingWhileJumpingMelee.name: No Attacking While Jumping Melee
bNoAttackingWhileJumpingMelee.description: Determines if an agent can melee attack while jumping.

bNoAttackingWhileJumpingThrowing.name: No Attacking While Jumping Throwing
bNoAttackingWhileJumpingThrowing.description: Determines if an agent can throwing attack while jumping.

bNoAttackingWhileJumpingRanged.name: No Attacking While Jumping Ranged
bNoAttackingWhileJumpingRanged.description: Determines if an agent can ranged attack while jumping.

fGhostModeCameraAcceleration.name: Ghost Mode Camera Acceleration
fGhostModeCameraAcceleration.description: Configures the Ghost Mode Camera Acceleration setting.

fGhostModeCameraMaxSpeed.name: Ghost Mode Camera Max Speed
fGhostModeCameraMaxSpeed.description: Configures the Ghost Mode Camera Max Speed setting.

fGhostModeCameraDamping.name: Ghost Mode Camera Damping
fGhostModeCameraDamping.description: Configures the Ghost Mode Camera Damping setting.

iMaxNumPrunableMissionObjects.name: Max Num Prunable Mission Objects
iMaxNumPrunableMissionObjects.description: When this limit is reached, deletes the oldest prunable mission object.

vStickItemToLeftHandOffset.name: Stick Item To Left Hand Offset

fMinActionProgressForAllyCollision.name: Min Action Progress For Ally Collision

fMaxActionProgressForAllyCollision.name: Max Action Progress For Ally Collision

fMinActionProgressForPropCollisionThrust.name: Min Action Progress For Prop Collision Thrust

fMinActionProgressForPropCollisionSwingR.name: Min Action Progress For Prop Collision Swing Right

fMinActionProgressForPropCollisionSwingL.name: Min Action Progress For Prop Collision Swing Left

fMinActionProgressForPropCollisionOversw.name: Min Action Progress For Prop Collision Overswing

fMaxActionProgressForPropCollisionThrust.name: Max Action Progress For Prop Collision Thrust

fMaxActionProgressForPropCollisionSwingR.name: Max Action Progress For Prop Collision Swing Right

fMaxActionProgressForPropCollisionSwingL.name: Max Action Progress For Prop Collision Swing Left

fMaxActionProgressForPropCollisionOversw.name: Max Action Progress For Prop Collision Overswing

fRangedDamageToPropsFactor.name: Ranged Damage To Props Factor
fRangedDamageToPropsFactor.description: Damage multiplier to props for ranged weapon.

fCouchedDamageToPropsFactor.name: Couched Damage To Props Factor
fCouchedDamageToPropsFactor.description: Damage multiplier to props for couched attack.

fBonusDamageToPropsFactor.name: Bonus Damage To Props Factor
fBonusDamageToPropsFactor.description: Damage multiplier to props if the weapon has a flag itp_bonus_against_shield.

fHorseChargeDamageMultiplier.name: Horse Charge Damage Multiplier
fHorseChargeDamageMultiplier.description: Scale charge damage inflicted by horses when ramming into human agents.

fMissileDamageSpeedPower.name: Missile Damage Speed Power
fMissileDamageSpeedPower.description: Range: 1.0-2.0. Setting speed_power to 2.0 makes damage scale with the square of missile’s speed. You can set it to 1.0 to make it scale linearly.

fMeleeDamageSpeedPower.name: Melee Damage Speed Power
fMeleeDamageSpeedPower.description: Range: 1.0-2.0. Setting speed_power to 2.0 makes damage scale with the square of weapon’s speed. You can set it to 1.0 to make it scale linearly.

fShieldPenetrationOffset.name: Shield Penetration Offset
fShieldPenetrationOffset.description: Missiles with (damage > shield_penetration_offset + shield_penetration_factor * shield) will penetrate a shield and cause damage to the wielder.

fShieldPenetrationFactor.name: Shield Penetration Factor
fShieldPenetrationFactor.description: Used in conjunction with shield_penetration_offset to determine if a missile can penetrate a shield.

fAirFrictionBullet.name: Air Friction Bullet
fAirFrictionBullet.description: Set the drag coefficient for bullets.

fExtraSoakFactor.name: Extra Soak Factor
fExtraSoakFactor.description: Used in conjunction with itp_extra_penetration to determine at what level extra penetration is soaked by armor.

fExtraReduceFactor.name: Extra Reduce Factor
fExtraReduceFactor.description: Used in conjunction with itp_extra_penetration to determine at what level extra penetration is reduced by armor.

fCutSoakFactor.name: Cut Soak Factor
fCutSoakFactor.description: Determines the amount which will be directly subtracted from cut damage due to armor.

fCutReduceFactor.name: Cut Reduce Factor
fCutReduceFactor.description: Determines the percentage reduction from the cut damage.

fBluntSoakFactor.name: Blunt Soak Factor
fBluntSoakFactor.description: Determines the amount which will be directly subtracted from blunt damage due to armor.

fBluntReduceFactor.name: Blunt Reduce Factor
fBluntReduceFactor.description: Determines the percentage reduction from the blunt damage.

fPierceSoakFactor.name: Pierce Soak Factor
fPierceSoakFactor.description: Determines the amount which will be directly subtracted from pierce damage due to armor.

fPierceReduceFactor.name: Pierce Reduce Factor
fPierceReduceFactor.description: Determines the percentage reduction from the pierce damage.

fCrushthroughThreshold.name: Crushthrough Threshold
fCrushthroughThreshold.description: Determines how much damage is required to crush through overhead blocks on weapons with the appropriate flag itp_crush_through.

fInterruptThreshold.name: Interrupt Threshold
fInterruptThreshold.description: Damage below this will not interrupt melee attacks.

fInterruptThresholdMultiplayer.name: Interrupt Threshold Multiplayer
fInterruptThresholdMultiplayer.description: Damage below this will not interrupt melee attacks in multiplayer.

fBrokenShieldPruneTime.name: Broken Shield Prune Time
fBrokenShieldPruneTime.description: Seconds required before a broken shield is removed from the scene. Setting it to 0 will prevent the items from despawning during a mission.

fDroppedItemPruneTime.name: Dropped Item Prune Time
fDroppedItemPruneTime.description: Seconds required before a dropped item is removed from the scene. Setting it to 0 will prevent the items from despawning during a mission.

fMissileItemPruneTime.name: Missile Item Prune Time
fMissileItemPruneTime.description: Seconds required before a fired arrow is removed from the scene. Setting it to 0 will prevent the items from despawning during a mission.

iWeaponTrails.name: Weapon Trails
iWeaponTrails.description: Weapon trails with motion blur. 0 - none, 1 - partial, 2 - full

bDismountHorseOnUse.name: Dismount Horse On Use
bDismountHorseOnUse.description: Dismount when looking at a horse and pressing gk_action.

bShowMultiplayerGold.name: Show Multiplayer Gold
bShowMultiplayerGold.description: Determines if the player’s gold is shown in multiplayer.

bMultiplayerWalkEnabled.name: Multiplayer Walk Enabled
bMultiplayerWalkEnabled.description: Determines if the players on a multiplayer server can use gk_walk to walk instead of run.

bDropAllItemsOnDeath.name: Drop All Items On Death
bDropAllItemsOnDeath.description: Drop all item on death or only wielded.

bDisableZoom.name: Disable Zoom
bDisableZoom.description: Determines whether or not the player can use gk_zoom to narrow the camera’s field of vision. Operation: is_zoom_disabled.

bCanObjectsMakeSound.name: Can Objects Make Sound
bCanObjectsMakeSound.description: Determines if scene props can emit sounds inside a scene. Different values on client and server break network compatibility and cause a crash.

bApplyAllAmmoDamageModifiers.name: Apply All Ammo Damage Modifiers
bApplyAllAmmoDamageModifiers.description: Added missile damage to weapons damage for any ranged weapons. Otherwise only for bows and crossbows.

bUseMissileDamageType.name: Use Missile Damage Type
bUseMissileDamageType.description: Use missile (arrow, bolt, bullet) damage type (cut, pierce, blunt) instead of launcher item (bow, crossbow, musket, pistol) damage type.

fFarPlaneDistance.name: Far Plane Distance
fFarPlaneDistance.description: Amount of units (in centimeters) that the render plane extends out from the camera inside of scenes.

bCanRunFasterWithSkills.name: Can Run Faster With Skills
bCanRunFasterWithSkills.description: Determines how agility and athletics affect running speed.

bHorsesTryRunningAway.name: Horses Try Running Away
bHorsesTryRunningAway.description: Determines if riderless horse agents will try to get away from aggressive agents.

bHorsesRearWithAttack.name: Horses Rear With Attack
bHorsesRearWithAttack.description: Determines if horses rear upon being struck with enough damage with thrust polearm blow.

bSyncRagdollEffects.name: Sync Ragdoll Effects
bSyncRagdollEffects.description: Determines if ragdolls are synced between client and server.

bCanAdjustCameraDistance.name: Can Adjust Camera Distance
bCanAdjustCameraDistance.description: Determines if the player can use gk_camera_closer and gk_camera_farther to adjust the default camera position.

bRestrictAttacksMoreInMultiplayer.name: Restrict Attacks More In Multiplayer
bRestrictAttacksMoreInMultiplayer.description: For multiplayer if an agent is stabbing or doing an overhead attack then the limit of the rotational speed will be set to 11 instead 16.

bNoFriendlyFireForBots.name: No Friendly Fire For Bots
bNoFriendlyFireForBots.description: Determines if AI agents can cause friendly fire.

fLancePikeEffectSpeed.name: Lance Pike Effect Speed
fLancePikeEffectSpeed.description: Determines the necessary speed of the horse at which the polearm causes horses rear.

fLancePikeEffectMinLength.name: Lance Pike Effect Min Length
fLancePikeEffectMinLength.description: Determines minimum lenght for polearm causes horses rear.

fLancePikeEffectMinDamage.name: Lance Pike Effect Min Damage
fLancePikeEffectMinDamage.description: Determines minimum inflicted damage at which the polearm causes horses rear.

bCanUseScenePropsInSinglePlayer.name: Can Use Scene Props In Single Player
bCanUseScenePropsInSinglePlayer.description: Determines if player in singleplayer can interact with scene_props like in multiplayer (using doors and drawbridges for example).

iMeekModifierSpeedBonus.name: Meek Modifier Speed Bonus
iMeekModifierSpeedBonus.description: Speed modifier for the horses that have the imod_timid modifier.

iTimidModifierSpeedBonus.name: Timid Modifier Speed Bonus
iTimidModifierSpeedBonus.description: Speed modifier for the horses that have the imod_meek modifier

bShorterPistolAiming.name: Shorter Pistol Aiming
bShorterPistolAiming.description: Required aiming animation progress for the shot is shorter for pistols, same as for muskets and crossbows. Otherwise only for muskets and crossbows.

bCanCrouch.name: Can Crouch
bCanCrouch.description: Determines if human agents can crouch. Different values on client and server break network compatibility due to replication.

bUsePhasedReload.name: Use Phased Reload
bUsePhasedReload.description: Determines if reloading can be done in steps. That means if your reload has been interrupted, you’ll start from the begining of the phase at which the reload was stopped. Phased reload works if you use itcf_reload_musket or itcf_reload_pistol for the ranged weapon.

bUseCrossbowAsFirearm.name: Use Crossbow As Firearm
bUseCrossbowAsFirearm.description: Determines whether crossbows will fire with smoke and a sound of explosion or with normal crossbow sound. Allow players reload crossbows while running or walking.

bCanReloadWhileMoving.name: Can Reload While Moving
bCanReloadWhileMoving.description: Determines if ai agent can reload crossbows while running or walking. Does not affect horseback. Needs bUseCrossbowAsFirearm to be enabled as well. Also limits movement speed when reloading for both ai and players.

fBraceRotationLimit.name: Brace Rotation Limit
fBraceRotationLimit.description: Affects items with the flag itp_is_pike and is used for rotation speed limiting while bracing spears (e.g. in NW). If the turning acceleration is less than 0.01 or the set value (whichever is higher) the game engine plays the pike crouch animation (anim_crouch_pike) and otherwise the crouch staff animation (anim_crouch_staff). You can obviously not give a value below the default one of 0.01 and if you provide a big value (it seems like 0.5 is enough) you can completely override the canceling effect.

bUseHorseSlopeForRiderPosition.name: Use Horse Slope For Rider Position
bUseHorseSlopeForRiderPosition.description: Сorrect legs position for riders on steep slopes.

bTurnAgentAsMultiplayer.name: Turn Agent As Multiplayer
bTurnAgentAsMultiplayer.description: Rotate the agent in the direction of view in singleplayer, just like in multiplayer.

bApplySkillForCouchingDamage.name: Apply Skill For Couching Damage
bApplySkillForCouchingDamage.description: Apply proficiency, power strike and strength to couching damage.

bAdvancedTurnRateFormulaForMelee.name: Advanced Turn Rate Formula For Melee
bAdvancedTurnRateFormulaForMelee.description: For multiplayer if an agent is release melee overswing or thrust attack instead default limit of the rotational speed use formula taking into account the type of weapon, the weight and length of the weapon.

bAdjustedShieldSkillDamage.name: Adjusted Shield Skill Damage
bAdjustedShieldSkillDamage.description: Changed damage formula for shield on shield hit depending on shield skill.

bAdjustedStagger.name: Adjusted Stagger
bAdjustedStagger.description: Changed stagger formula for thrown, bow and crossbow, more chance when hitting legs.

bAdjustedKnockdown.name: Adjusted Knockdown
bAdjustedKnockdown.description: Changed knockdown formula, more chance when hitting legs or head.

bItemSpeedAffectSpeedBonusForDamage.name: Item Speed Affect Speed Bonus For Damage
bItemSpeedAffectSpeedBonusForDamage.description: Item speed for melee weapon affects speed bonus for damage calculation.

bTakeAttackersSpeedForRangedSpeedBonus.name: Take Attackers Speed For Ranged Speed Bonus
bTakeAttackersSpeedForRangedSpeedBonus.description: Whether to take into account speed of shooter agent together with speed of missile to calculate damage of missile, or only speed of missile.

bTweakCrushthroughDamageReduction.name: Tweak Crushthrough Damage Reduction
bTweakCrushthroughDamageReduction.description: With crushthrough for attack power use multiplier from range 0.7 - 0.8 instead 0.4 - 0.6.

bRandomTroopEquipping.name: Random Troop Equipping
bRandomTroopEquipping.description: Changes the algorithm of random equipment for troops and does not take into account the value of the item.

bReduceDamageRandomness.name: Reduce Damage Randomness
bReduceDamageRandomness.description: Random multiplier range for soaked and reduced damage 0.7 - 0.75 instead 0.45 - 1.0.

fKickRange.name: Kick Range
fKickRange.description: Squared range for kick, so 0.16 means 0.4 meters.

bMoreProficiencyEffectForMovingSpeedWhil.name: More Proficiency Effect For Moving Speed While Reloading
bMoreProficiencyEffectForMovingSpeedWhil.description: Changes formula for moving speed while reloading for more effect from reloadable weapon proficiency.

bShowCrosshair.name: Show Crosshair
bShowCrosshair.description: Show crosshair for singleplayer. Operation: set_show_crosshair.

bHorseFriendlyFire.name: Horse Friendly Fire
bHorseFriendlyFire.description: Horse charge friendly fire for singleplayer. Operation: set_horse_friendly_fire.

bSyncBlockDirections.name: Sync Block Directions
bSyncBlockDirections.description: Determines if block directions are synced between client and server.

fToggleItemModeCooldown.name: Toggle Item Mode Cooldown
fToggleItemModeCooldown.description: Configures the Toggle Item Mode Cooldown setting.

fPowerDrawSkillDamageBonus.name: Power Draw Skill Damage Bonus
fPowerDrawSkillDamageBonus.description: Configures the Power Draw Skill Damage Bonus setting.

fPowerThrowSkillDamageBonus.name: Power Throw Skill Damage Bonus
fPowerThrowSkillDamageBonus.description: Configures the Power Throw Skill Damage Bonus setting.

fPowerStrikeSkillDamageBonus.name: Power Strike Skill Damage Bonus
fPowerStrikeSkillDamageBonus.description: Configures the Power Strike Skill Damage Bonus setting.

bShieldSkillAffectsProtectionArea.name: Shield Skill Affects Protection Area
bShieldSkillAffectsProtectionArea.description: Determines if shield skill affects shield's area of protection.

fSpeedPenaltyForTwoHandedAndPolearmWithS.name: Speed Penalty For Two Handed And Polearm With Shield
fSpeedPenaltyForTwoHandedAndPolearmWithS.description: Configures the Speed Penalty For Two Handed And Polearm With Shield setting.

fAdditionalSpeedPenaltyForTwoHandedPrope.name: Additional Speed Penalty For Two Handed Property With Shield
fAdditionalSpeedPenaltyForTwoHandedPrope.description: Configures the Additional Speed Penalty For Two Handed Property With Shield setting.

fDamagePenaltyMultiplierForTwoHandedAndP.name: Damage Penalty Multiplier For Two Handed And Polearm With Shield
fDamagePenaltyMultiplierForTwoHandedAndP.description: Configures the Damage Penalty Multiplier For Two Handed And Polearm With Shield setting.

fAdditionalDamagePenaltyMultiplierForPol.name: Additional Damage Penalty Multiplier For Polearm With Shield
fAdditionalDamagePenaltyMultiplierForPol.description: Configures the Additional Damage Penalty Multiplier For Polearm With Shield setting.

fAdditionalDamagePenaltyMultiplierForTwo.name: Additional Damage Penalty Multiplier For Two Handed Property With Shield
fAdditionalDamagePenaltyMultiplierForTwo.description: Configures the Additional Damage Penalty Multiplier For Two Handed Property With Shield setting.

fDamagePenaltyMultiplierForTwoHandedAndP.name: Damage Penalty Multiplier For Two Handed And Polearm With Mount
fDamagePenaltyMultiplierForTwoHandedAndP.description: Configures the Damage Penalty Multiplier For Two Handed And Polearm With Mount setting.

fAdditionalDamagePenaltyMultiplierForPol.name: Additional Damage Penalty Multiplier For Polearm With Mount
fAdditionalDamagePenaltyMultiplierForPol.description: Configures the Additional Damage Penalty Multiplier For Polearm With Mount setting.

fAdditionalDamagePenaltyMultiplierForTwo.name: Additional Damage Penalty Multiplier For Two Handed Property With Mount
fAdditionalDamagePenaltyMultiplierForTwo.description: Configures the Additional Damage Penalty Multiplier For Two Handed Property With Mount setting.

bOverswingAndThrustMusketUsableOnHorseba.name: Overswing And Thrust Musket Usable On Horseback
bOverswingAndThrustMusketUsableOnHorseba.description: Configures the Overswing And Thrust Musket Usable On Horseback setting.

bOverswingSpearUsableOnHorseback.name: Overswing Spear Usable On Horseback
bOverswingSpearUsableOnHorseback.description: Configures the Overswing Spear Usable On Horseback setting.

bHorsebackSlashPolearmUsableOnlyWithoutS.name: Horseback Slash Polearm Usable Only Without Shield
bHorsebackSlashPolearmUsableOnlyWithoutS.description: Configures the Horseback Slash Polearm Usable Only Without Shield setting.

bThrustMusketUsableOnlyWithoutShield.name: Thrust Musket Usable Only Without Shield
bThrustMusketUsableOnlyWithoutShield.description: Configures the Thrust Musket Usable Only Without Shield setting.

iDynamicBannerTransparencyMinAlpha.name: Dynamic Banner Transparency Min Alpha
iDynamicBannerTransparencyMinAlpha.description: Configures the Dynamic Banner Transparency Min Alpha setting.

bUseLowVariationCache.name: Use Low Variation Cache
bUseLowVariationCache.description: Reduces variation of cached meshes (possibly improving performance) in modules with two skins (male, female) only.

bHasAccessoriesForFemale.name: Has Accessories For Female
bHasAccessoriesForFemale.description: Changed beard caption for female skin (1) from ui_change_beard to ui_change_accessories.

bMoreSkinsSupportForMultiplayerProfile.name: More Skins Support For Multiplayer Profile
bMoreSkinsSupportForMultiplayerProfile.description: Enable support for more than two multiplayer skins for profile.

bLimitHairColors.name: Limit Hair Colors
bLimitHairColors.description: Set to true if you don’t have extra hair textures. Each human skin definition in Native uses hair_blonde along with vertex coloring. If you set the value to false the game expects to find for example a material and texture named hair_red, beard_black, etc.

iMaxNumGrassInstances.name: Max Num Grass Instances
iMaxNumGrassInstances.description: Configures the Max Num Grass Instances setting.

iMaxNumGrassTypes.name: Max Num Grass Types
iMaxNumGrassTypes.description: Configures the Max Num Grass Types setting.

iMaxNumTreeInstances.name: Max Num Tree Instances
iMaxNumTreeInstances.description: Configures the Max Num Tree Instances setting.

iMaxNumTreeTypes.name: Max Num Tree Types
iMaxNumTreeTypes.description: Configures the Max Num Tree Types setting.

iMaxNumFloraInstances.name: Max Num Flora Instances
iMaxNumFloraInstances.description: Configures the Max Num Flora Instances setting.

iMaxNumFloraTypes.name: Max Num Flora Types
iMaxNumFloraTypes.description: Configures the Max Num Flora Types setting.

iDeadFavoritesPurgeTime.name: Dead Favorites Purge Time
iDeadFavoritesPurgeTime.description: Remove dead server from favorites after this time.

iDeadFavoritesPurgeTries.name: Dead Favorites Purge Tries
iDeadFavoritesPurgeTries.description: Remove dead server from favorites after this num search tries.

bHideOtherModServers.name: Hide Other Mod Servers
bHideOtherModServers.description: Hide servers running other mods from the servers list.

bShowShotDifficulty.name: Show Shot Difficulty
bShowShotDifficulty.description: Configures the Show Shot Difficulty setting.

bShowProficiencyGain.name: Show Proficiency Gain
bShowProficiencyGain.description: Configures the Show Proficiency Gain setting.

bShowScreenshotPath.name: Show Screenshot Path
bShowScreenshotPath.description: Configures the Show Screenshot Path setting.

bShowMultiplayerChat.name: Show Multiplayer Chat
bShowMultiplayerChat.description: Configures the Show Multiplayer Chat setting.

bShowMultiplayerTeamChat.name: Show Multiplayer Team Chat
bShowMultiplayerTeamChat.description: Configures the Show Multiplayer Team Chat setting.

iMultiplayerKills.name: Multiplayer Kills
iMultiplayerKills.description: 0 - none, 1 - own, 2 - all, 3 - player deaths, 4 - own kills and player deaths

uMultiplayerChatColor.name: Multiplayer Chat Color
uMultiplayerChatColor.description: Configures the Multiplayer Chat Color setting.

uMultiplayerTeamChatColor.name: Multiplayer Team Chat Color
uMultiplayerTeamChatColor.description: Configures the Multiplayer Team Chat Color setting.

iMaxNumNotificationMessages.name: Max Num Notification Messages
iMaxNumNotificationMessages.description: Number of messages in battle. Value 4 - about 10 messages. It may be confusing, but the formula is linear, so it's not hard to figure out the number of rows you need.

bFixNotificationMessages.name: Fix Notification Messages
bFixNotificationMessages.description: Fix Warband bug where the combat log disappears from the screen if too much information is being written out too quickly.

fPlayerHealingFactor.name: Player Healing Factor
fPlayerHealingFactor.description: Multiplier of the wound treatment skill for player.

fMainPartyHeroHealingFactor.name: Main Party Hero Healing Factor
fMainPartyHeroHealingFactor.description: Multiplier of the wound treatment skill for main party hero.

fMainPartyRegularHealingFactor.name: Main Party Regular Healing Factor
fMainPartyRegularHealingFactor.description: Multiplier of the wound treatment skill for main party regular troops.

fHeroHealingFactor.name: Hero Healing Factor
fHeroHealingFactor.description: Multiplier of the wound treatment skill for hero.

fRegularHealingFactor.name: Regular Healing Factor
fRegularHealingFactor.description: Multiplier of the wound treatment skill for regular troops.

fPlayerExperienceMultiplier.name: Player Experience Multiplier
fPlayerExperienceMultiplier.description: Sets the xp multiplier the player gains by killing an enemy.

fHeroExperienceMultiplier.name: Hero Experience Multiplier
fHeroExperienceMultiplier.description: Sets the xp multiplier heroes gain by killing an enemy.

fRegularExperienceMultiplier.name: Regular Experience Multiplier
fRegularExperienceMultiplier.description: Sets the xp multiplier regular troops gain by killing an enemy.

fPlayerWoundedThreshold.name: Player Wounded Threshold
fPlayerWoundedThreshold.description: Determines the minimum number of hitpoints a player must have to appear in battles and contribute to party skills.

fHeroWoundedThreshold.name: Hero Wounded Threshold
fHeroWoundedThreshold.description: Determines the minimum hitpoints needed for heroes to appear in battles and contribute to party skills.

fDayStartHour.name: Day Start Hour
fDayStartHour.description: Defines the boundaries of day and night time.

fDayEndHour.name: Day End Hour
fDayEndHour.description: Defines the boundaries of day and night time.

vMapCameraMinPosition.name: Map Camera Min Position
vMapCameraMinPosition.description: Determines the eastern and northern bounds of the world map. The map can continue past this, but parties will not be able to travel past this boundary.

vMapCameraMaxPosition.name: Map Camera Max Position
vMapCameraMaxPosition.description: Determines the western and southern bounds of the world map. The map can continue past this, but parties will not be able to travel past this boundary.

fMapCameraMinZoom.name: Map Camera Min Zoom
fMapCameraMinZoom.description: Minimum amount of zoom out on the world map.

fMapCameraMaxZoom.name: Map Camera Max Zoom
fMapCameraMaxZoom.description: Maximum amount of zoom out on the world map.

vMapSeaSpeed.name: Map Sea Speed
vMapSeaSpeed.description: Used to determine the flow speed of the ocean shader for the world map.

fMapSeaWaveRotation.name: Map Sea Wave Rotation
fMapSeaWaveRotation.description: Angle, this is where the tear artefact is visible on the sea.

vMapRiverSpeed.name: Map River Speed
vMapRiverSpeed.description: Used to determine the flow speed of the river shader for the world map.

fMapRiverDirection.name: Map River Direction
fMapRiverDirection.description: Angle used to determine the flow direction of the river shader for the world map.

fSpottingMultiplier.name: Spotting Multiplier
fSpottingMultiplier.description: Multiplier of the spotting skill, affects the visibility radius.

fTrackSpottingMultiplier.name: Track Spotting Multiplier
fTrackSpottingMultiplier.description: Multiplier of the tracking skill. If set to 0 no tracking marks will appear at the world map no matter the skill.

iLeadershipSkillBonus.name: Leadership Skill Bonus
iLeadershipSkillBonus.description: Sets how many additional troops per leadership skill point the player can have in his party.

iPrisonerManagementSkillBonus.name: Prisoner Management Skill Bonus
iPrisonerManagementSkillBonus.description: Sets how many additional prisoners per prisoner management skill point the player can have in his party.

iBaseCompanionLimit.name: Base Companion Limit
iBaseCompanionLimit.description: Maximum amount of companions in the player party without leadership skill.

fTimeMultiplier.name: Time Multiplier
fTimeMultiplier.description: Speed with which time passes on the map screen. With 0.25 as default value 1 GAME hour is 4 seconds of REAL time.

bShowPartyIdsInsteadOfNames.name: Show Party Ids Instead Of Names
bShowPartyIdsInsteadOfNames.description: Determines if a party’s id value is show above them instead of their name. Change to true for ease in module development.

bDontLoadRegularTroopInventories.name: Dont Load Regular Troop Inventories
bDontLoadRegularTroopInventories.description: Determines if the game saves inventories for regular troops (i.e. not heroes) too. Also, savegames will be a bit bigger.

bShowFactionColor.name: Show Faction Color
bShowFactionColor.description: Determines if party names on the world map will show their faction color.

bAutoCreateNoteIndices.name: Auto Create Note Indices
bAutoCreateNoteIndices.description: Determines whether or not automatically search through all troops/factions/towns to check if they have note text.

bShowTroopUpgradesButton.name: Show Troop Upgrades Button
bShowTroopUpgradesButton.description: Determines if the mod shows the troop upgrade button.

fSkillPointsPerLevel.name: Skill Points Per Level
fSkillPointsPerLevel.description: Sets how many skill points are gained per level.

fAttributePointsPerLevel.name: Attribute Points Per Level
fAttributePointsPerLevel.description: Sets how many attribute points are gained per level.

fWeaponPointsPerLevel.name: Weapon Points Per Level
fWeaponPointsPerLevel.description: Sets how many weapon proficiency points are gained per level.

fLevelBoundaryMultiplier.name: Level Boundary Multiplier
fLevelBoundaryMultiplier.description: Sets the multiplier for EXP needed for troop to upgrade.

iAttributeRequiredPerSkillLevel.name: Attribute Required Per Skill Level
iAttributeRequiredPerSkillLevel.description: Sets how many attribute points are required per skill level.

iDisableDisbandOnTerrainType.name: Disable Disband On Terrain Type
iDisableDisbandOnTerrainType.description: Used to insure parties cannot disband on certain tiles (Like passable water).

bDisableForceLeavingConversations.name: Disable Force Leaving Conversations
bDisableForceLeavingConversations.description: Disables the TAB end in conversations.

fMapCameraMinElevation.name: Map Camera Min Elevation
fMapCameraMinElevation.description: Sets the minimum distance the camera can be from the terrain in the world map.

fMapCameraMaxElevation.name: Map Camera Max Elevation
fMapCameraMaxElevation.description: Sets the maximum distance the camera can be from the terrain in the world map.

bAutoComputePartyRadius.name: Auto Compute Party Radius
bAutoComputePartyRadius.description: Uses the party icon model to determine party radius. Especially important for modules with large town icons as it allows parties to interact with them in expected locations, as opposed to the center of the icon.

bUseDirect3D9ExIfAvailable.name: Use Direct3 D9 Ex If Available
bUseDirect3D9ExIfAvailable.description: An extension only available in Windows Vista and newer.

iMaximumFrameLatency.name: Maximum Frame Latency
iMaximumFrameLatency.description: Works only if Direct3D9Ex is enabled. The maximum number of back buffer frames that a driver can queue. The value defaults to 3, but can range from 1 to 16. A value of 0 will reset latency to the default.

iPreset.name: Preset
iPreset.description: 0 - custom, 1 - low, 2 - medium, 3 - high, 4 - very high

iWindowedDisplayX.name: Windowed Display X
iWindowedDisplayX.description: Configures the Windowed Display X setting.

iWindowedDisplayY.name: Windowed Display Y
iWindowedDisplayY.description: Configures the Windowed Display Y setting.

iWindowedDisplayWidth.name: Windowed Display Width
iWindowedDisplayWidth.description: Configures the Windowed Display Width setting.

iWindowedDisplayHeight.name: Windowed Display Height
iWindowedDisplayHeight.description: Configures the Windowed Display Height setting.

iFullscreenDisplayWidth.name: Fullscreen Display Width
iFullscreenDisplayWidth.description: Configures the Fullscreen Display Width setting.

iFullscreenDisplayHeight.name: Fullscreen Display Height
iFullscreenDisplayHeight.description: Configures the Fullscreen Display Height setting.

iFullscreenDisplayDepth.name: Fullscreen Display Depth
iFullscreenDisplayDepth.description: Configures the Fullscreen Display Depth setting.

iFullscreenDisplayRefreshRate.name: Fullscreen Display Refresh Rate
iFullscreenDisplayRefreshRate.description: Configures the Fullscreen Display Refresh Rate setting.

iGraphicsBufferLockFailThreshold.name: Graphics Buffer Lock Fail Threshold
iGraphicsBufferLockFailThreshold.description: Configures the Graphics Buffer Lock Fail Threshold setting.

bAutoAdjustAspectRatio.name: Auto Adjust Aspect Ratio
bAutoAdjustAspectRatio.description: Configures the Auto Adjust Aspect Ratio setting.

bForceVSync.name: Force V Sync
bForceVSync.description: Prevents screen tearing, can cause input lag.

iAnisotropicFiltering.name: Anisotropic Filtering
iAnisotropicFiltering.description: Reduces blur on distant surfaces. Values: 0, 2, 4, 8, 16.

bInstancing.name: Instancing
bInstancing.description: Method that renders multiple copies of a mesh with the same material in a single draw call. Each copy of the mesh is called an instance. This is useful for drawing things that appear multiple times in a scene, for example, trees or bushes.

iMultisampleType.name: Multisample Type
iMultisampleType.description: Antialiasing (MSAA). Smooths out jagged edges on solid objects.

bAlphaToCoverage.name: Alpha To Coverage
bAlphaToCoverage.description: Transparency Antialiasing (MSAA). Smooths out jagged edges on semi-transparent objects.

bDynamicMeshBatching.name: Dynamic Mesh Batching
bDynamicMeshBatching.description: For small enough meshes, this transforms their vertices on the CPU, groups similar vertices together, and renders them in one draw call. Requires "Combine meshes" or "Combine low-poly meshes" flag for material in brf.

iMaxNumAutoBatchMeshVertices.name: Max Num Auto Batch Mesh Vertices
iMaxNumAutoBatchMeshVertices.description: Vertices limit for mesh with "Combine low-poly meshes" material flag.

bOnDemandTextures.name: On Demand Textures
bOnDemandTextures.description: Configures the On Demand Textures setting.

iOnDemandTextureCheckThreshold.name: On Demand Texture Check Threshold
iOnDemandTextureCheckThreshold.description: Configures the On Demand Texture Check Threshold setting.

fOnDemandTextureCheckPeriod.name: On Demand Texture Check Period
fOnDemandTextureCheckPeriod.description: Configures the On Demand Texture Check Period setting.

fOnDemandTextureForceCheckPeriod.name: On Demand Texture Force Check Period
fOnDemandTextureForceCheckPeriod.description: Configures the On Demand Texture Force Check Period setting.

iOnDemandTextureTimeout.name: On Demand Texture Timeout
iOnDemandTextureTimeout.description: Configures the On Demand Texture Timeout setting.

iInitialNumBufferedInstances.name: Initial Num Buffered Instances
iInitialNumBufferedInstances.description: Configures the Initial Num Buffered Instances setting.

iMaxNumBufferedInstances.name: Max Num Buffered Instances
iMaxNumBufferedInstances.description: Configures the Max Num Buffered Instances setting.

iIndexBufferSizeStatic.name: Index Buffer Size Static
iIndexBufferSizeStatic.description: Configures the Index Buffer Size Static setting.

iIndexBufferSizeDynamic.name: Index Buffer Size Dynamic
iIndexBufferSizeDynamic.description: Configures the Index Buffer Size Dynamic setting.

iVertexBufferSizeRegularStatic.name: Vertex Buffer Size Regular Static
iVertexBufferSizeRegularStatic.description: Modders may adjust these large enough so that the game will not need to restore buffers during the game. However keeping them excessively large will reduce performance in most systems.

iVertexBufferSizeRegularDynamic.name: Vertex Buffer Size Regular Dynamic
iVertexBufferSizeRegularDynamic.description: Configures the Vertex Buffer Size Regular Dynamic setting.

iVertexBufferSizeNormalMapStatic.name: Vertex Buffer Size Normal Map Static
iVertexBufferSizeNormalMapStatic.description: Configures the Vertex Buffer Size Normal Map Static setting.

iVertexBufferSizeNormalMapDynamic.name: Vertex Buffer Size Normal Map Dynamic
iVertexBufferSizeNormalMapDynamic.description: Configures the Vertex Buffer Size Normal Map Dynamic setting.

iVertexBufferSizeSkinningStatic.name: Vertex Buffer Size Skinning Static
iVertexBufferSizeSkinningStatic.description: Configures the Vertex Buffer Size Skinning Static setting.

iVertexBufferSizeSkinningDynamic.name: Vertex Buffer Size Skinning Dynamic
iVertexBufferSizeSkinningDynamic.description: Configures the Vertex Buffer Size Skinning Dynamic setting.

iVertexBufferSizeNormalMapSkinningStatic.name: Vertex Buffer Size Normal Map Skinning Static
iVertexBufferSizeNormalMapSkinningStatic.description: Configures the Vertex Buffer Size Normal Map Skinning Static setting.

iVertexBufferSizeNormalMapSkinningDynami.name: Vertex Buffer Size Normal Map Skinning Dynamic
iVertexBufferSizeNormalMapSkinningDynami.description: Configures the Vertex Buffer Size Normal Map Skinning Dynamic setting.

iVertexBufferSizeSpecialStatic.name: Vertex Buffer Size Special Static
iVertexBufferSizeSpecialStatic.description: Configures the Vertex Buffer Size Special Static setting.

iVertexBufferSizeSpecialDynamic.name: Vertex Buffer Size Special Dynamic
iVertexBufferSizeSpecialDynamic.description: Configures the Vertex Buffer Size Special Dynamic setting.

iDiffuseMapMinFilter.name: Diffuse Map Min Filter
iDiffuseMapMinFilter.description: 0 - filtering disabled, 1 - nearest, 2 - linear interpolation, 3 - anisotropic

iDiffuseMapMagFilter.name: Diffuse Map Mag Filter
iDiffuseMapMagFilter.description: 0 - filtering disabled, 1 - nearest, 2 - linear interpolation, 3 - anisotropic

iNormalMapMinFilter.name: Normal Map Min Filter
iNormalMapMinFilter.description: 0 - filtering disabled, 1 - nearest, 2 - linear interpolation, 3 - anisotropic

iNormalMapMagFilter.name: Normal Map Mag Filter
iNormalMapMagFilter.description: 0 - filtering disabled, 1 - nearest, 2 - linear interpolation, 3 - anisotropic

iSpecularMapMinFilter.name: Specular Map Min Filter
iSpecularMapMinFilter.description: 0 - filtering disabled, 1 - nearest, 2 - linear interpolation, 3 - anisotropic

iSpecularMapMagFilter.name: Specular Map Mag Filter
iSpecularMapMagFilter.description: 0 - filtering disabled, 1 - nearest, 2 - linear interpolation, 3 - anisotropic

iEnvironmentMapMinFilter.name: Environment Map Min Filter
iEnvironmentMapMinFilter.description: 0 - filtering disabled, 1 - nearest, 2 - linear interpolation, 3 - anisotropic

iEnvironmentMapMagFilter.name: Environment Map Mag Filter
iEnvironmentMapMagFilter.description: 0 - filtering disabled, 1 - nearest, 2 - linear interpolation, 3 - anisotropic

iCubeMapMinFilter.name: Cube Map Min Filter
iCubeMapMinFilter.description: 0 - filtering disabled, 1 - nearest, 2 - linear interpolation, 3 - anisotropic

iCubeMapMagFilter.name: Cube Map Mag Filter
iCubeMapMagFilter.description: 0 - filtering disabled, 1 - nearest, 2 - linear interpolation, 3 - anisotropic

bUseBorderedShadowSampler.name: Use Bordered Shadow Sampler
bUseBorderedShadowSampler.description: use D3DTADDRESS_BORDER instead D3DTADDRESS_CLAMP for shadow map sampler

fMouseXScale.name: Mouse X Scale
fMouseXScale.description: Configures the Mouse X Scale setting.

fMouseYScale.name: Mouse Y Scale
fMouseYScale.description: Configures the Mouse Y Scale setting.

bInvertMouseX.name: Invert Mouse X
bInvertMouseX.description: Configures the Invert Mouse X setting.

bInvertMouseY.name: Invert Mouse Y
bInvertMouseY.description: Configures the Invert Mouse Y setting.

bEnableGamepadVibration.name: Enable Gamepad Vibration
bEnableGamepadVibration.description: Configures the Enable Gamepad Vibration setting.

iGamepadLeftThumbDeadzone.name: Gamepad Left Thumb Deadzone
iGamepadLeftThumbDeadzone.description: Configures the Gamepad Left Thumb Deadzone setting.

iGamepadRightThumbDeadzone.name: Gamepad Right Thumb Deadzone
iGamepadRightThumbDeadzone.description: Configures the Gamepad Right Thumb Deadzone setting.

iGamepadTriggerThreshold.name: Gamepad Trigger Threshold
iGamepadTriggerThreshold.description: Configures the Gamepad Trigger Threshold setting.

sStoredLogDirectory.name: Stored Log Directory
sStoredLogDirectory.description: Configures the Stored Log Directory setting.

sSunFlareMesh.name: Sun Flare Mesh
sSunFlareMesh.description: Configures the Sun Flare Mesh setting.

sSunFlareMaterial.name: Sun Flare Material
sSunFlareMaterial.description: Configures the Sun Flare Material setting.

fCharacterDetail.name: Character Detail
fCharacterDetail.description: Used to select a entity lod depending on distance. Range: 0.0-1.0.

bUseSceneUnloading.name: Use Scene Unloading
bUseSceneUnloading.description: Once you start mission, it’s unload all scenes from RAM.

iUdpReceiveBufferSize.name: Udp Receive Buffer Size
iUdpReceiveBufferSize.description: Size of a socket's receive buffer.

iUdpSendBufferSize.name: Udp Send Buffer Size
iUdpSendBufferSize.description: Size of a socket's send buffer.

iMaxNumServerSearchConnections.name: Max Num Server Search Connections
iMaxNumServerSearchConnections.description: Configures the Max Num Server Search Connections setting.

bAutoSelectClientPort.name: Auto Select Client Port
bAutoSelectClientPort.description: Configures the Auto Select Client Port setting.

fServerActivityTimeout.name: Server Activity Timeout
fServerActivityTimeout.description: Configures the Server Activity Timeout setting.

fClientActivityTimeout.name: Client Activity Timeout
fClientActivityTimeout.description: Configures the Client Activity Timeout setting.

fServerInfoRequestActivityTimeout.name: Server Info Request Activity Timeout
fServerInfoRequestActivityTimeout.description: Configures the Server Info Request Activity Timeout setting.

fPlayerInfoRequestActivityTimeout.name: Player Info Request Activity Timeout
fPlayerInfoRequestActivityTimeout.description: Configures the Player Info Request Activity Timeout setting.

bHttpServerQueries.name: Http Server Queries
bHttpServerQueries.description: Returns xml by default. Can be overridden using wse_get_server_info script.

bBreakWarbandCompatibility.name: Break Warband Compatibility
bBreakWarbandCompatibility.description: Changes the network protocol for enable some advanced WSE features like composite network messages and more skins in multiplayer.

bOGPServer.name: O G P Server
bOGPServer.description: Open game protocol for quering server info.

bRCONServer.name: R C O N Server
bRCONServer.description: Source rcon protocol for remote console commands.

iRCONServerPort.name: R C O N Server Port

sRCONServerPassword.name: R C O N Server Password
sRCONServerPassword.description: Configures the R C O N Server Password setting.

iNumPlayersLimit.name: Num Players Limit
iNumPlayersLimit.description: Different values on client and server break network compatibility (different size of number in bits). So put this value in the settings of your module and not only to server. Range: 2-1000. Operation: get_max_players.

iMultiplayerEventForAnnounce.name: Multiplayer Event For Announce
iMultiplayerEventForAnnounce.description: Used for announce console command and other WSE2 server notifications since Warband doesn't have a hardcoded event for that purpose. 111 for Native and VC, 105 for NW. For other modules check header_common.py and search multiplayer_event_show_server_message or similar.

bServerLockFov.name: Server Lock Fov
bServerLockFov.description: Used server-side for lock fov for all WSE2 players to default 75.

bFastDL.name: Fast D L
bFastDL.description: Quick download of server's custom maps from external storage.

iReflectionsMode.name: Reflections Mode
iReflectionsMode.description: Water reflections mode. Full reflections are performance heavy. Disable them if you are experiencing low frame rates. 0 - disable, 1 - sky, 2 - sky and landscape objects, 3 - full (perfomance heavy)

iReflectionsMinFilter.name: Reflections Min Filter
iReflectionsMinFilter.description: 0 - filtering disabled, 1 - nearest, 2 - linear interpolation, 3 - anisotropic

iReflectionsMagFilter.name: Reflections Mag Filter
iReflectionsMagFilter.description: 0 - filtering disabled, 1 - nearest, 2 - linear interpolation, 3 - anisotropic

bAutoRestartOnCrash.name: Auto Restart On Crash
bAutoRestartOnCrash.description: Configures the Auto Restart On Crash setting.

iMaxNumFailedAutoRestarts.name: Max Num Failed Auto Restarts
iMaxNumFailedAutoRestarts.description: Prevents a restart loop if the server crashes on startup.

fMinTimeForSuccessfulAutoRestart.name: Min Time For Successful Auto Restart
fMinTimeForSuccessfulAutoRestart.description: The minimum server uptime at which a restart is considered successful and the restart counter is reset.

bLogTeamChat.name: Log Team Chat
bLogTeamChat.description: Configures the Log Team Chat setting.

bLogIPs.name: Log I Ps
bLogIPs.description: Logs ip with player's connect and disconnect.

bStoreConsolePlacement.name: Store Console Placement
bStoreConsolePlacement.description: Configures the Store Console Placement setting.

vConsoleWindowPosition.name: Console Window Position
vConsoleWindowPosition.description: Configures the Console Window Position setting.

vConsoleWindowSize.name: Console Window Size
vConsoleWindowSize.description: Configures the Console Window Size setting.

bAutoSplitModuleConsoleCommands.name: Auto Split Module Console Commands
bAutoSplitModuleConsoleCommands.description: Automatically splits the console command by spaces and puts strings into registers for wse_console_command_received script.

bAdvancedLogFormat.name: Advanced Log Format
bAdvancedLogFormat.description: Uses advanced log format instead standart Warband's. More convenient for parsing logs.

bFakeCharacterShadows.name: Fake Character Shadows
bFakeCharacterShadows.description: Enables fake character shadows (shadows that are cast on collision meshes).

sFakeCharacterShadowShader.name: Fake Character Shadow Shader
sFakeCharacterShadowShader.description: Configures the Fake Character Shadow Shader setting.

sFakeCharacterShadowShaderHighQuality.name: Fake Character Shadow Shader High Quality
sFakeCharacterShadowShaderHighQuality.description: Configures the Fake Character Shadow Shader High Quality setting.

uFakeCharacterShadowColor.name: Fake Character Shadow Color
uFakeCharacterShadowColor.description: Configures the Fake Character Shadow Color setting.

fFakeCharacterShadowDepthBias.name: Fake Character Shadow Depth Bias
fFakeCharacterShadowDepthBias.description: Configures the Fake Character Shadow Depth Bias setting.

fFakeCharacterShadowSlopeScaledDepthBias.name: Fake Character Shadow Slope Scaled Depth Bias
fFakeCharacterShadowSlopeScaledDepthBias.description: Configures the Fake Character Shadow Slope Scaled Depth Bias setting.

bDisableFrequencyVariation.name: Disable Frequency Variation
bDisableFrequencyVariation.description: Configures the Disable Frequency Variation setting.

iMaxNumChannels.name: Max Num Channels
iMaxNumChannels.description: Configures the Max Num Channels setting.

iMaxNumVirtualChannels.name: Max Num Virtual Channels
iMaxNumVirtualChannels.description: Configures the Max Num Virtual Channels setting.

bOcclusion.name: Occlusion
bOcclusion.description: Sound occlusion in games refers to a process that imitates how sounds are perceived in "closed" environments, closed meaning that there are barriers close to the sound source or listener. It's can drop performance dramatically with a large number of agents or other sound sources.

bOcclusionFilter.name: Occlusion Filter
bOcclusionFilter.description: All FMOD_SOFTWARE (and FMOD_HARDWARE on 3DS and NGP) with FMOD_3D based voices will add a software lowpass filter effect into the DSP chain which is automatically used when Channel::set3DOcclusion is used or the geometry API.

bHrtfFilter.name: Hrtf Filter
bHrtfFilter.description: All FMOD_SOFTWARE (and FMOD_HARDWARE on 3DS and NGP) with FMOD_3D based voices will add a software lowpass filter effect into the DSP chain which causes sounds to sound duller when the sound goes behind the listener.

bDistanceFilter.name: Distance Filter
bDistanceFilter.description: All FMOD_SOFTWARE with FMOD_3D based voices will add a software lowpass and highpass filter effect into the DSP chain which will act as a distance-automated bandpass filter.

bWasapiExclusive.name: Wasapi Exclusive
bWasapiExclusive.description: Win32 Vista only - for WASAPI output - Enable exclusive access to hardware, lower latency at the expense of excluding other applications from accessing the audio hardware.

fDistancePriorityFactor.name: Distance Priority Factor
fDistancePriorityFactor.description: Configures the Distance Priority Factor setting.

fShadowMapDepthBias.name: Shadow Map Depth Bias
fShadowMapDepthBias.description: Configures the Shadow Map Depth Bias setting.

fShadowMapSlopeScaledDepthBias.name: Shadow Map Slope Scaled Depth Bias
fShadowMapSlopeScaledDepthBias.description: Configures the Shadow Map Slope Scaled Depth Bias setting.

sShadowMapShader.name: Shadow Map Shader
sShadowMapShader.description: Configures the Shadow Map Shader setting.

iShadowMapNumPasses.name: Shadow Map Num Passes
iShadowMapNumPasses.description: Configures the Shadow Map Num Passes setting.

iAttributeHorse.name: Attribute Horse
iAttributeHorse.description: Set difficulty requirement for item types (check attributes in header_troops.py and skills in header_skills.py).

iAttributeOneHanded.name: Attribute One Handed
iAttributeOneHanded.description: Configures the Attribute One Handed setting.

iSkillOneHanded.name: Skill One Handed
iSkillOneHanded.description: Configures the Skill One Handed setting.

iAttributeTwoHanded.name: Attribute Two Handed
iAttributeTwoHanded.description: Configures the Attribute Two Handed setting.

iSkillTwoHanded.name: Skill Two Handed
iSkillTwoHanded.description: Configures the Skill Two Handed setting.

iAttributeHeadArmor.name: Attribute Head Armor
iAttributeHeadArmor.description: Configures the Attribute Head Armor setting.

iSkillHeadArmor.name: Skill Head Armor
iSkillHeadArmor.description: Configures the Skill Head Armor setting.

iAttributeBodyArmor.name: Attribute Body Armor
iAttributeBodyArmor.description: Configures the Attribute Body Armor setting.

iSkillBodyArmor.name: Skill Body Armor
iSkillBodyArmor.description: Configures the Skill Body Armor setting.

iAttributeFootArmor.name: Attribute Foot Armor
iAttributeFootArmor.description: Configures the Attribute Foot Armor setting.

iSkillFootArmor.name: Skill Foot Armor
iSkillFootArmor.description: Configures the Skill Foot Armor setting.

iAttributeHandArmor.name: Attribute Hand Armor
iAttributeHandArmor.description: Configures the Attribute Hand Armor setting.

iSkillHandArmor.name: Skill Hand Armor
iSkillHandArmor.description: Configures the Skill Hand Armor setting.

iResolveTimeout.name: Resolve Timeout
iResolveTimeout.description: In milliseconds, to use for name resolution.

iConnectTimeout.name: Connect Timeout
iConnectTimeout.description: In milliseconds, to use for server connection requests.

iSendTimeout.name: Send Timeout
iSendTimeout.description: In milliseconds, to use for sending requests.

iReceiveTimeout.name: Receive Timeout
iReceiveTimeout.description: In milliseconds, to receive a response to a request.

iReduceCampaignAi.name: Reduce Campaign Ai
iReduceCampaignAi.description: Deprecated. 0 - good, 1 - average, 2 - poor. Operations: options_get_campaign_ai, options_set_campaign_ai, game_get_reduce_campaign_ai.

bUseStrictPathfindingForShips.name: Use Strict Pathfinding For Ships
bUseStrictPathfindingForShips.description: Keeps ships at sea for sea-to-sea routes.

bThreadedRenderer.name: Threaded Renderer
bThreadedRenderer.description: Executes a task on a separate thread. Solves the cpu bottleneck.

bThreadedSkeletalAnimation.name: Threaded Skeletal Animation
bThreadedSkeletalAnimation.description: Configures the Threaded Skeletal Animation setting.

bThreadedVertexBufferWrites.name: Threaded Vertex Buffer Writes
bThreadedVertexBufferWrites.description: Configures the Threaded Vertex Buffer Writes setting.

bThreadedIndexBufferWrites.name: Threaded Index Buffer Writes
bThreadedIndexBufferWrites.description: Configures the Threaded Index Buffer Writes setting.

iTaskCriticalSectionSpinCount.name: Task Critical Section Spin Count
iTaskCriticalSectionSpinCount.description: Sets the spin count for the specified critical section. Spinning means that when a thread tries to acquire a critical section that is locked, the thread enters a loop, checks to see if the lock is released, and if the lock is not released, the thread goes to sleep.

iRenderBufferCriticalSectionSpinCount.name: Render Buffer Critical Section Spin Count
iRenderBufferCriticalSectionSpinCount.description: Configures the Render Buffer Critical Section Spin Count setting.

iRenderThreadCriticalSectionSpinCount.name: Render Thread Critical Section Spin Count
iRenderThreadCriticalSectionSpinCount.description: Configures the Render Thread Critical Section Spin Count setting.

iAsyncRenderCallsCriticalSectionSpinCoun.name: Async Render Calls Critical Section Spin Count
iAsyncRenderCallsCriticalSectionSpinCoun.description: Configures the Async Render Calls Critical Section Spin Count setting.

iNetworkCriticalSectionSpinCount.name: Network Critical Section Spin Count
iNetworkCriticalSectionSpinCount.description: Configures the Network Critical Section Spin Count setting.

iTextureLoadCriticalSectionSpinCount.name: Texture Load Critical Section Spin Count
iTextureLoadCriticalSectionSpinCount.description: Configures the Texture Load Critical Section Spin Count setting.

iTextureCreateCriticalSectionSpinCount.name: Texture Create Critical Section Spin Count
iTextureCreateCriticalSectionSpinCount.description: Configures the Texture Create Critical Section Spin Count setting.

iTextureUseCriticalSectionSpinCount.name: Texture Use Critical Section Spin Count
iTextureUseCriticalSectionSpinCount.description: Configures the Texture Use Critical Section Spin Count setting.

iFlushInterval.name: Flush Interval
iFlushInterval.description: Flushes the profiling file stream every x sec (only flushes on exit if 0).

iParticleSystemMaxNumMeshVertices.name: Particle System Max Num Mesh Vertices
iParticleSystemMaxNumMeshVertices.description: Limit for particle mesh vertices. range: 0-65536

iParticleSystemMaxNumRenderedParticles.name: Particle System Max Num Rendered Particles

fParticleSystemDegradeDistance.name: Particle System Degrade Distance
fParticleSystemDegradeDistance.description: The distance at which the number of bursted particles decreases. range: 10.0-60.0

fParticleSystemUpdateInterval.name: Particle System Update Interval
fParticleSystemUpdateInterval.description: The time during which the particles are accumulated (not burst every frame).

bHasForcedParticles.name: Has Forced Particles
bHasForcedParticles.description: Allows the mod to ’force’ particles. Used if the particles are important in the module and the player should not disable them.

bFontAnisotropicFiltering.name: Font Anisotropic Filtering
bFontAnisotropicFiltering.description: Use anisotropic instead linear interpolation for min filter. Limit for anisotropic filtering - 4.

bAllBodiesAreMoveable.name: All Bodies Are Moveable
bAllBodiesAreMoveable.description: Moveable physics on all scene props; no sokf_moveable flag will be needed.

bRagdollHeadshots.name: Ragdoll Headshots
bRagdollHeadshots.description: Uses a ragdoll with shot force when killing an agent with a crossbow, musket, or pistol on a non-hand and non-leg hit. Operations - options_get_realistic_headshots, options_set_realistic_headshots.

fRagdollPurgeTime.name: Ragdoll Purge Time
fRagdollPurgeTime.description: End ragdoll, when this time has passed.

fRagdollOnGroundPurgeTime.name: Ragdoll On Ground Purge Time
fRagdollOnGroundPurgeTime.description: End ragdoll, when agent on ground and this time has passed.

fRagdollInactivePurgeTime.name: Ragdoll Inactive Purge Time
fRagdollInactivePurgeTime.description: End ragdoll, when ragdoll inactive and this time has passed.

fMaxDeltaTimeStep.name: Max Delta Time Step
fMaxDeltaTimeStep.description: Time step for advancement state of ragdoll simulation. Operation - set_physics_delta_time.

fMaxSlowMotionDeltaTimeStep.name: Max Slow Motion Delta Time Step
fMaxSlowMotionDeltaTimeStep.description: Same, if cheat mode slow-motion enabled.

bRagdollSoak.name: Ragdoll Soak
bRagdollSoak.description: Blows is beaten on corpses and thus prevents an unintentional teamhits.

bRagdollSoakApplyForce.name: Ragdoll Soak Apply Force
bRagdollSoakApplyForce.description: Apply blow force to beaten on corpses.
